description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9 Docker image and cache the node_modules/ directory. Define a before_script that runs npm install gitbook-cli -g, gitbook fetch latest, and gitbook install for all jobs. Add a test job in the test stage that executes gitbook build . public, runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that also runs gitbook build . public, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact expiring in one week, and only runs on the master branch.
